paperTitle: DepthVLA: Enhancing Vision-Language-Action Models with Depth-Aware Spatial Reasoning

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 96.4 · libero object 98 · libero goal 95.8 · libero 10 89.2 | Table II | Notes: Standard LIBERO 4-suite, single model for all suites, 2000 total trials.

benchmarks.label: SimplerEnv
benchmarks.detail: Tasks: put spoon on towel vm 75.8 · put carrot on plate vm 71.7 · stack green block on yellow block vm 62.5 · put eggplant in basket vm 89.2 | Table I | Notes: WidowX VM tasks, trained on BridgeData V2, evaluated zero-shot.
